overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player navigating concrete stairwells and neon-lit streets in Night City. The clip transitions between indoor Brutalist stairwells with cyan lighting and rain-soaked outdoor urban environments featuring holographic advertisements and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: brutalist concrete stairwell with cyan lighting

agents.ego_description: walking up a concrete stairwell with fluorescent tube lighting

entered.detail: brutalist concrete architecture with geometric pillars and steps
long cyan-white fluorescent tubes mounted on walls
smooth dark concrete surfaces with horizontal light strips

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a dimly lit concrete stairwell characterized by Brutalist architecture and cyan fluorescent lighting. The environment is empty and enclosed, with scattered trash visible on the steps.

events.description: exits covered stairwell onto elevated outdoor terrace with palm tree

agents.ego_description: stepping out onto a rooftop terrace and panning to observe the surrounding cityscape

entered.detail: tall palm tree with full foliage growing from the terrace
large rectangular billboard with purple and yellow text reading MAXTAC and 16
black futuristic car with red taillights and BUDGET text on rear
tall building with illuminated blue window lights
elevated highway or monorail structure spanning between buildings

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto a rain-slicked elevated terrace with a single palm tree, revealing a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape. Neon billboards including a MAXTAC advertisement and a parked futuristic vehicle are visible as the camera pans to take in the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell descending to street level

events.description: re-enters covered stairwell from outdoor terrace
exits stairwell at ground level onto city street

agents.ego_description: walking down the concrete stairs toward street level

entered.detail: same brutalist stairwell structure now viewed from descending angle

segments.scene_description: The player descends back into the concrete stairwell, leaving the outdoor terrace behind. The camera moves down the cyan-lit stairs and exits at ground level onto a city street.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown street with commercial signage

events.description: waits at intersection as cars pass by
crosses the street at crosswalk with traffic light turning green

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and crossing the street at a crosswalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the wet street

entered.detail: modern glass facade with grid of illuminated blue windows
large vertical neon sign with red text reading kabayan and karaoke
low orange metal barriers along the sidewalk edge
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
tall pole with illuminated traffic signals

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a rain-soaked city street lined with orange railings and illuminated glass buildings. After waiting for traffic, the player crosses at a crosswalk toward a large neon sign reading 'kabayan' while futuristic vehicles drive past on the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered escalator entrance to commercial building

agents.ego_description: walking up stairs alongside other pedestrians entering the building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in vest and hat descending the stairs

entered.detail: indoor stairwell with escalator and cyan overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: The player enters another covered stairwell featuring an escalator and digital advertisement screens. Other pedestrians are visible moving in the opposite direction as the player ascends toward an upper level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the sterile confines of a Brutalist stairwell out into the vibrant, rain-soaked chaos of a cyberpunk metropolis. It begins by ascending a dimly lit concrete stairwell bathed in cyan fluorescent light and scattered with trash before emerging onto a rain-slicked elevated terrace. As the camera pans across a sprawling cityscape of neon billboards and futuristic vehicles, the perspective shifts back down the cyan-lit stairs to exit at ground level. The scene then opens onto a wet city street lined with orange railings and illuminated glass buildings, where the camera crosses a busy intersection toward a large neon kabayan sign. Finally, the movement leads into a covered transit area featuring an escalator and digital screens, ascending through a crowd of pedestrians toward an upper level.
